description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing SupportingDocument entities, providing methods to query documents based on user ID, loan draft ID, and document ID.
external_methods: JpaRepository's methods like save, delete, findById, findAll

classes.name: SupportingDocumentRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for SupportingDocument entities, providing custom query methods based on user and loan draft IDs.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Retrieves all SupportingDocument entries for a specific user, ordered by creation date descending.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdAndLoanDraftIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Retrieves all SupportingDocument entries for a user and specific loan draft, ordered by creation date descending.

methods.name: findByIdAndUserId
methods.description: Finds a specific SupportingDocument by its ID and user ID.
